word: G4817 - συλλογίζομαι - syllogízomai - sool-log-id'-zom-ahee - Reason with

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to bring together accounts, reckon up, compute,
2. to reckon with oneself, to reason
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G3049; to reckon together (with oneself), that is, deliberate: - reason with.
